title: Plutarch, Moralia: On Envy and Hate
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: On Envy and Hate.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: On Envy and Hate.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'On Envy and Hate': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
